text.title: Pricing Experiment Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals — subs count, grandfather mechanism, pre-flight, currency coverage, dispute spike — to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the product have ≥30 active subscriptions and a real (non-cosmetic) pricing change?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — stabilise dispute rate before any price change
BLOCK — write the Plan before any Stripe change
BLOCK — pin to Stripe coupon or separate Price; never delete old Price
BLOCK — pre-flight script must return green within 7 days of start
APPROVE — experiment ready to launch / close

text.example: 312 active subs, dispute_rate 0.2 (under 0.5), Plan committed, grandfather coupon pinned, pre-flight green 4 days before start, single currency USD, decision memo written within 48h of end → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
